Headline: #108 Halsted/95th & #8A South Halsted buses Temporary Southbound Reroute near Halsted/95th
ShortDescription: Southbound #108 Halsted/95th & #8A South Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Halsted/95th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #108 Halsted/95th & #8A South Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Halsted/95th.

Southbound #108 Halsted/95th buses rerouted via 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Halsted and over regular route.

Southbound #8A South Halsted buses rerouted via Halsted, 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Halsted and over regular route.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
